g.title: Blad.293
g.desc: E = 210 GPa ν = 0.3 (-) Forces and support reactions are acti...
g.text: E = 210 GPaν = 0.3 (-)Forces and support reactions are acting on the normal force centre (N.C.).The cross-section can be regarded as thin-walled.---Krachten en oplegreacties grijpen aan in het normaalkrachtencentrum (N.C.).De doorsnede mag als dunwandig beschouwd worden.
